summary: TWO_COLUMN: ValueTracker t rotates î (green) and ĵ (red) on the left plane via e^(At) for A=[[0,-1],[1,0]]. Right column has live t, cos t, sin t, the closed-form rotation matrix, AND a 7-term partial-sum approximation that agrees to ~4 decimals — showing the series and matrix exponential are the same object.
